full_description: Improve your productivity with Focus Timer. This app helps you stay on track and avoid distractions by providing a customizable timer and tracking system. Set your desired focus interval and break time, and the app will guide you through your work sessions. Track your progress and stay motivated to achieve your goals. Features include: customizable timer, tracking and statistics, reminder notifications, and a simple, intuitive interface. Download Focus Timer now and start boosting your productivity.
